candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A line, but it appears as a component within the selected parent row 'Cost of Revenues - Total', alongside other COGS subcomponents. Adding it separately would double count relative to the already selected COGS total.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is also COGS-related depreciation, but it appears as another component within the Cost of Revenues build-up before 'Cost of Revenues - Total'. Since the selected COGS bucket is the total row, this depreciation is already embedded and should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Revenues - Total'. The visible COGS D&A rows are subcomponents of that total, so no separate COGS_DA row should be added.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This label appears under both 'Distribution, selling and marketing costs' and 'Administrative costs', indicating it is a subcomponent of the selected XSGA component rows rather than a separate same-level overhead line. Adding it separately would likely double count.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combination of 'Distribution, selling and marketing costs' and 'Administrative costs'. The SG&A D&A rows appear nested within those selected component totals, and there is no separate above-EBIT R&D row to trigger a special R&D adjustment.
